subcodes.first_line: Thou hast been remembered in the Most Great Prison before the Wronged One, and from the Most Glorious Horizon and the Supreme Pen these words have been sent down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت در سجن اعظم نزد مظلوم مذکور و از افق ابهی و قلم اعلی اینکلمات نازل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
